ItacPersonItem.Notes: He delivered the inaugural oration on the opening of the Informi Academy (which he hosted in his house), and subsequently anoher oration against Cato Uticensi`s suicide. Both orations were published in Venice in 1627. See Gino Benzoni, Collurafi, Antonino, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
